sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 123 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 & 24. 2. For orders on CMA No.128/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 20.10.2025 Mr. Akber Sohail, advocate and Mr. Sami ur Rehman, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Munawwar Ali Memon, advocate for the respondent. It is jointly submitted that questions raised in this reference application are covered by a Division Bench judgment of this court dated 21.08.2025 in ITRA 121 of 2015 and connected matters, therefore, it is sought that for the reasons stated in the aforementioned judgment, this reference application may also be disposed of upon the same terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
